findings.finding: The gate adds a 1s ls-remote tax to every cortex overnight status invocation with no caching or rate-limit (only no_origin log dedup is mentioned), so frequent status polling from dashboards or runners pays repeated network cost.
findings.reviewer_angle: Workflow composition with cortex overnight start
findings.evidence_quote: git ls-remote main with 1s Python-side timeout (logging ls_remote_timeout / ls_remote on failures)
